heading_path: AAO-HNSF Updated Clinical Practice Guideline: Acute Otitis Externa – Press Release & Fact Sheet
paragraph_or_text_span: What is Acute Otitis Externa? Acute Otitis Externa (AOE), commonly known as “swimmer’s ear,” is one of the most common infections encountered by clinicians, affecting 2.4 million people (1 in 123) annually in the United States, with regional variations based on age and geography.
